title: Galt Fab Foil Art
features: FANTASTIC FOIL ART KIT: Create 8 sparkly pictures by simply peeling off a section from the picture, place the foil over the sticky area, rub and then lift to transfer sparkly foil to your picture
COMPREHENSIVE ARTS AND CRAFTS SET: The craft set includes 25 foil sheets in 8 assorted colours, 8 pictures and a useful how-to guide to help you through the activity set, Picture size: 18 x 12.5cm
LEARNING MADE FUN: Watch your children be inspired with the Fab Foil Art kit, The kids craft kit encourages self-expression, innovation and creativity, as well as helping to improve fine motor skills
ACTIVITY PACK RANGE: Explore the world of arts and crafts for kids with Galt Toys Activity Packs, These imaginative children’s craft kits include all the materials to inspire any budding artist
CRAFT KIT FOR KIDS AGES 6 PLUS: Designed with little hands in mind, Ideal for children from the ages of 6 years plus, watch your children enhance their motor skills in a fun and engaging way
description: From the manufacturer Fab Foil Art Create 8 sparkly pictures with this foil art kit. Simply peel off a section from the picture, place the foil over the sticky area and rub with your finger. Lift up the foil sheet and the sparkly foil transfers to the picture. About Galt Toys History James Galt & Co. Ltd. has been established for over 180 years. James Galt himself was born at Stewarton in Ayrshire and set up as an educational stockist in Manchester in 1836. In the 1850s the company expanded into printing and publishing and in 1957 the company moved from Manchester to Cheadle in Cheshire. In 1961 the Galt Toys division was formed. Products Galt produces and sells quality toys which meet the needs of all stages of child development from 0-10 years. Galt products are designed to be fun and to encourage learning through play. Traditionally the company is associated with art, craft and activity products. In more recent years Galt has established a name for itself in the First Years category with the innovative Playnest.
